name: great-filmmakers
description: Twelve filmmaker personas + slash commands for scene breakdown and film-craft work. Companion to great-authors-plugin.

plugins.name: great-filmmakers
plugins.description: 12 filmmaker personas + 6 slash commands including /film-crew (backend-aware pipeline that emits HeyGen, Veo 3, or Remotion-ready artifacts). Shares the .great-authors/ bible with great-authors-plugin.
